_meta.experiment: Operating-point ladder: PTQ vs +distill at K2 and K3 (GSM8K)
verdict: Distillation does NOT let K2 beat K3 (K3-PTQ > K2+distill on both models).
Distillation's value = make the RECOMMENDED K3 lossless: K3+distill reaches ~FP (1.5B 0.38->0.54=FP; Qwen3-1.7B 0.627->0.653, ~93%).
And it RESCUES K2 from zero (0->0.32-0.45) when you cannot afford K3.
So: K3 = product reco (Paper B); +distill = optional booster to close the residual to FP; K2+distill = rescue lever when memory-bound. Cost: rank-64 LoRA ~+20% bits (rank-16 fails).
